name: Mairik Adult Day Care
address: 7255 S. Havana St. Suite 130, Centennial, CO 80112
services: Adult day program, unskilled/non-medical care; serves I/DD, physical disabilities, mental health, ADL assistance, deaf/hard of hearing
notes: Closest facility — same zip code. Contact: Irina Matevosyants, mairikdaycare@gmail.com

name: Someren Glen Adult Day Services
services: Memory care day program for early-stage memory loss/dementia; faith-based nonprofit (Christian Living Communities); also offers residential, assisted living, skilled nursing on campus
notes: Well-established nonprofit campus with multiple care levels

name: Alpine Adult Day Care
services: Elderly and disabled care; specialized habilitation; brain injury certified; hot meals, transportation, fitness/recreation, RN/CNA on staff, video monitoring, outings
notes: Free trial day offered. Also accepts Medicaid and VA benefits

name: Adult Day Care Services of Colorado
services: Recreation program, social involvement, independence-focused activities; described as one of the best recreation programs in Denver Metro area
notes: Very affordable private pay rates for those not on Medicaid

name: Prestige Senior Social Club Adult Day Care
address: 2680 S. Havana St. Unit C, Aurora, CO 80014
services: Door-to-door transportation, therapeutic/recreational activities, physical exercise, field trips, beauty services (skin therapy, massage, hairdressing), meals (breakfast, snack, lunch)
notes: Active 5-star Google/Facebook reviews suggest operational

name: Colorado Spirit Adult Day Care Services
address: 10610 E. Bethany Dr., Unit A, Aurora, CO 80014
services: Personal care services, nutritious meals, English/computer classes, yoga, outings, hair services, theatrical activities

name: Comfort Adult Day Care
address: 10691 E. Bethany Dr., Suite 900, Aurora, CO 80014
services: Transportation, meals, entertainment
notes: Website may redirect; call directly

name: Hans Adult Daycare LLC
address: 911 S. Havana St., Suite A, Aurora, CO 80012
services: Transportation, nutritional meals, exercise/dance (senior yoga, line dancing), educational classes (calligraphy, English, smartphone training), karaoke, bingo, nursing staff

name: 2nd Home Community — Iliff
services: Multilingual staff (English, Korean, Spanish, Russian, Arabic); social activities, meals, transportation, personal care, memory care
notes: Medicaid free; call for private pay rates. Medicare accepted

name: 2nd Home Community — Peoria
services: Multilingual staff (English, Korean, Spanish, Russian, Arabic); social activities, meals, transportation, personal care, memory care
notes: Same operator as Iliff location

name: 2nd Home Community — Parker
services: Multilingual staff (English, Korean, Spanish, Russian, Arabic); social activities, meals, transportation, personal care, memory care
notes: Same operator as Iliff location

name: 2nd Home Community — Abilene
address: 1200 S. Abilene St., Unit C, Aurora, CO 80012
services: Multilingual staff (English, Korean, Spanish, Russian, Arabic); social activities, meals, transportation, personal care, memory care
notes: Same operator as Iliff location

name: Happy Living and Wellness Adult Daycare
services: Culturally responsive programs for Chinese-speaking elders (serving since 2016); meals, tai chi, field trips, mahjong, structured schedules, birthday celebrations. Wheelchair accessible
notes: Chinese-language focus

name: Paradise Senior Daycare (Comport Paradise)
services: Adult day care, Medicaid certified
notes: Website was unreachable during research; call directly

name: Compassion Adult Daycare
services: Adult day care, disability services, care services

name: Flatirons Adult Day Care
address: 15433 E. Hampden Ave., Suite D, Aurora, CO 80013
services: Social support, nutritional meals, recreational activities, education and skill building; non-residential
notes: Aurora location (separate Broomfield location exists)

name: New Day In-Home and Respite Services
address: 20971 E. Smoky Hill Rd., Suite 101, Centennial, CO 80015
services: Day programs for developmental disabilities; in-home support, respite services, companionship, meal prep, personal care. 365 days/year including weekends
notes: Primarily I/DD-focused; confirm whether they serve seniors with non-I/DD needs

name: Johnson Adult Day Program
services: Designed for individuals with dementia; programs to keep patients occupied and entertained
notes: Single source (Caring.com); InnovAge connection unverified. Phone is Caring.com advisor line — call facility directly

name: Apex Adult Day Services
services: Affordable day services for adults with physical, developmental, cognitive, and intellectual impairments; medication management, meal service, transportation via shuttle, games, trivia
notes: ~1 mile east of I-225 at Alameda Ave. Contact: marym@apex-adsco.com

name: Venezia Innovative Services — Adult Day Program
services: Meals, wellness checks, transportation, medication administration; serves seniors and blind/disabled individuals; I/DD and behavioral/emotional disorders
notes: ~2.5 miles east of I-225 near E. 6th Ave exit. SSL expired on website — call directly. Executive Director: Love Dzakpasu

name: InnovAge Colorado PACE Center — Aurora
services: All-inclusive PACE care: medical services, PT, OT, speech therapy, behavioral health, nutrition, social engagement, rehab, bingo, themed outings. Requires age 55+, Medicaid/Medicare eligible
notes: PACE program — Medicare/Medicaid ONLY, does NOT accept private pay. Included for awareness only

name: Seniors' Choice Adult Day Program
services: Day activities, home and community support, safe/supportive environment for seniors of all abilities; supported employment program; Medicaid waiver accepted
notes: Operated by Continuum of Colorado. ~2 miles east of I-225. Two addresses listed — confirm current location

name: World Wide Adult Day Care and Transportation
address: 10890 E. Dartmouth Ave., Unit I, Aurora, CO 80014
services: Specialized adult day services; 15 years of experience; tailored programs, activities, compassionate support, home care and transportation
notes: Free trial day offered. ~3 miles east of I-225. Listed as Denver CO 80014 but is Aurora

name: Aurora Adult Day Care LLC
address: 1330 S. Potomac St., Suite 118, Aurora, CO 80012
services: Physical/mental activities, group activities/socialization, freshly prepared meals, transportation, monthly excursions to museums, parks, cultural events
notes: Contact for tours. ~1 mile west of I-225. Email: auroraadcllc@gmail.com

name: Everest Adult Day Care LLC
address: 12201 E. Mississippi Ave., Unit 101, Aurora, CO 80012
services: Music therapy, art classes, games, exercise, meals, transportation
notes: ~1.5 miles east of I-225

name: Relax Adult Day Care
services: Personalized care, meals, transportation
notes: Single directory listing only

name: BMH Corp. LLC
services: Compassionate elderly care
notes: Single directory listing only
